title: God Is
content:
God is;
        God sees;
        God loves;
        God knows.
    And Right is Right;
    And Right is Might.
    In the full ripeness of His Time,
    All these His vast prepotencies
    Shall round their grace-work to the prime
    Of full accomplishment,
    And we shall see the plan sublime
    Of His beneficent intent.
    Live on in hope!
    Press on in faith!
    Love conquers all things,
    Even Death.
meaning:
"God Is" is a quintessential example of William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
